channel.title: OOIR Trends: Clinical Medicine (Integrative & Complementary Medicine)
channel.description: Aktuelle Paper-Trends im Bereich Clinical Medicine (Integrative & Complementary Medicine) von OOIR (mit Titel und Metadaten von Crossref)

item.title: Role of an Ayurvedic formulation ‘Kalyanaka Ghrita’ in mild cognitive impairment: A single-patient, quasi-randomized, controlled, open-label N-of-1 trial
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 13 Autoren: Swati Sharma, Arun Kaushik, Sankha Shubhra Chakrabarti, Kishor Patwardhan Journal: Journal of Ethnopharmacology Veröffentlicht: 2026-12-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.jep.2026.122089 ISSN: 0378-8741 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-08

item.title: Manual therapy treatment mechanisms are complex: Challenges and a call to action
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Chad E. Cook, Damian Keter, Vitaly Napadow, Mary F. Barbe, Stephen M. Perle, Jennifer Bent, Kenneth Learman, William R. Reed Journal: Complementary Therapies in Medicine Veröffentlicht: 2026-09-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.ctim.2026.103393 ISSN: 0965-2299 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-08

item.title: The effect of stress ball use on stress, sleep quality, and comfort in individuals receiving hemodialysis: a randomized controlled trial
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Ayse Kacaroglu Vicdan, Dilek Gibyeli Genek Journal: BMC Complementary Medicine and Therapies Veröffentlicht: 2026-06-06 DOI: 10.1186/s12906-026-05429-9 ISSN: 2662-7671 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-08

item.title: Network meta-analysis of different traditional Chinese medicine therapies as adjuvant treatments for Alzheimer's disease
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Zongbao Li, Xiuhua Bai, Jiping Li, Wenyi Geng, Xin Xing, Jianqing Liang, Jintian Li, Juan Li Journal: Complementary Therapies in Clinical Practice Veröffentlicht: 2026-08-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.ctcp.2026.102075 ISSN: 1744-3881 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-08

item.title: Chrysin reprograms microglial metabolism and function via targeting SYK to alleviate the symptoms of Alzheimer's disease
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Lixi Li, Yanjia Gu, Xinyue Luo, Jinyu Wang, Ying Jia, Tingxu Yan Journal: Journal of Ethnopharmacology Veröffentlicht: 2026-11-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.jep.2026.122056 ISSN: 0378-8741 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-08
